report_name: TheGentlemen Ransomware Claims Attack on Institucion Cervantes in Argentina

threat_actors.name: TheGentlemen
threat_actors.description: A ransomware group that claimed responsibility for a cyberattack on Institucion Cervantes in Argentina. The group operates a dark web leak site and employs double-extortion tactics, threatening to publish stolen data to pressure victims into paying a ransom. The group appears to be global and opportunistic in its targeting.
threat_actors.goals: Financial extortion through ransomware and data theft.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: TheGentlemen group deployed ransomware to encrypt files on servers and workstations at Institucion Cervantes, disrupting the institution's operations.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: As part of a double-extortion model, TheGentlemen attackers stole sensitive data from the victim's network before deploying ransomware.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: Phishing was cited as a common, although unconfirmed in this specific case, initial access vector for ransomware groups like TheGentlemen.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: The use of 'vssadmin.exe delete shadows' was suggested as a likely technique used by the ransomware to prevent system recovery from volume shadow copies.

attack_patterns.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: PowerShell
attack_patterns.description: The use of encoded PowerShell commands ('powershell.exe -enc') was suggested as a hunting hint, indicating its likely use for reconnaissance and lateral movement.

attack_patterns.name: Create Account
attack_patterns.description: The creation of a new user account (Windows Event ID 4720) was suggested as a potential persistence mechanism used by the attackers.

malware.name: TheGentlemen Ransomware
malware.description: Ransomware used by TheGentlemen group to encrypt victim files and extort payment. The group threatens to leak data stolen by the malware if the ransom is not paid.

tools.name: vssadmin
tools.description: The vssadmin.exe utility was likely used to delete volume shadow copies to inhibit system recovery.

identities.name: Institucion Cervantes
identities.description: A private higher education institution in Córdoba, Argentina, targeted by TheGentlemen ransomware group in a double-extortion attack.

identities.name: Danish sports equipment supplier
identities.description: An unnamed Danish sports equipment supplier also claimed as a victim by TheGentlemen ransomware group on the same day as the Institucion Cervantes attack.

identities.name: clinic in North Dakota
identities.description: An unnamed clinic in North Dakota also claimed as a victim by TheGentlemen ransomware group on the same day as the Institucion Cervantes attack.

infrastructure.name: TheGentlemen Leak Site
infrastructure.description: A dark web data leak site operated by TheGentlemen group to publish names of victims and threaten the release of stolen data to extort ransom payments.

indicators.name: PowerShell Encoded Command Execution
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious PowerShell Encoded Command
id: 7e5f8a1b-9c4d-4f2a-8b1e-3d6c9a0b8c7d
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of encoded PowerShell commands, a technique frequently used by ransomware actors for obfuscation.
references:
  - https://www.dexpose.io/thegentlemen-ransomware-attack-on-institucion-cervantes/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.execution
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - ' -enc '
      - ' -encodedcommand '
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of encoded PowerShell commands, a common technique for ransomware deployment and lateral movement.

indicators.name: VSS Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: f8a1b2c3-d4e5-4f6a-b7c8-d9e0f1a2b3c4
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common ransomware tactic to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://www.dexpose.io/thegentlemen-ransomware-attack-on-institucion-cervantes/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects attempts to delete volume shadow copies using vssadmin.exe, a behavior strongly associated with ransomware attacks.

indicators.name: TheGentlemen Ransomware File Extension
indicators.pattern:
title: TheGentlemen Ransomware File Extension Detected
id: a1b2c3d4-e5f6-4a7b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects files being created or renamed with the .thegentlemen extension, which is a potential indicator for TheGentlemen ransomware activity.
references:
  - https://www.dexpose.io/thegentlemen-ransomware-attack-on-institucion-cervantes/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: critical
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.thegentlemen'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of files with the '.thegentlemen' extension, a likely indicator of compromise for this ransomware family.

indicators.name: TheGentlemen Ransom Note Creation
indicators.pattern:
title: TheGentlemen Ransom Note File Creation
id: b2c3d4e5-f6a7-4b8c-9d0e-1f2a3b4c5d6e
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of common ransom note filenames, such as ReadMe.txt or How_To_Decrypt.html, which are dropped by ransomware like TheGentlemen.
references:
  - https://www.dexpose.io/thegentlemen-ransomware-attack-on-institucion-cervantes/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '\ReadMe.txt'
      - '\How_To_Decrypt.html'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of ransom notes, a key indicator of a ransomware attack in progress.

indicators.name: Suspicious User Account Creation
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious User Account Creation
id: c3d4e5f6-a7b8-4c9d-a0e1-f2a3b4c5d6e7
status: experimental
description: 'Detects the creation of a new user account (Windows Event ID 4720), which could indicate an attacker creating a persistence mechanism.'
references:
  - https://www.dexpose.io/thegentlemen-ransomware-attack-on-institucion-cervantes/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
  - attack.t1136
  - attack.persistence
level: medium
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4720
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of a new user account, which could be an attacker establishing persistence on a compromised system.
